iron-vice-gauntlets.name: Iron Vice Gauntlets
iron-vice-gauntlets.description: Heavy gauntlets that turn every grip into a crushing vice against blade and bone.

runehand-gloves.name: Runehand Gloves
runehand-gloves.description: Silk gloves inscribed with power-amplifying sigils that sharpen every spell cast.

knifework-wraps.name: Knifework Wraps
knifework-wraps.description: Tight wraps that balance the fingers over blade edges and let daggers fly fast and true.

consecrated-grips.name: Consecrated Grips
consecrated-grips.description: Gloves blessed on a cathedral high altar; steady for mace strokes and healing rites alike.

bowmaster-grips.name: Bowmaster Grips
bowmaster-grips.description: Waxed leather grips optimized for rapid-fire draw; the bowstring never bites the skin.

crushers-of-doom.name: Crushers of Doom
crushers-of-doom.description: Gauntlets that make every blow a lethal mauling. Blood coats the iron knuckles constantly.

arcanist-foci-gloves.name: Arcanist Foci Gloves
arcanist-foci-gloves.description: Gloves that channel raw magic through crystal fingertip foci with surgical precision.

nightfall-wraps.name: Nightfall Wraps
nightfall-wraps.description: Dark wraps that drink enemy blood to power the next strike. They never stay clean.

saintly-grasp.name: Saintly Grasp
saintly-grasp.description: Holy hands that bind wounds and shackle foes alike; touched by the grace of two saints.

predator-grips.name: Predator Grips
predator-grips.description: Grips soaked in marsh extract that track and slow prey through scent and instinct alone.

titan-gauntlets.name: Titan Gauntlets
titan-gauntlets.description: Gauntlets forged for a titan. The earth itself buckles beneath each crushing strike.

void-hands.name: Void Hands
void-hands.description: Hands shaped from void matter that incinerate whatever they touch with cold black flame.

shadowstrike-wraps.name: Shadowstrike Wraps
shadowstrike-wraps.description: Wraps made from shadow silk; each strike is an execution, each scratch a slow death.

hallowed-hands.name: Hallowed Hands
hallowed-hands.description: Gloves blessed by three saints in sequence; healing and righteous smiting in equal measure.

galeforce-grips.name: Galeforce Grips
galeforce-grips.description: Grips that channel wind itself, making every arrow fly with the force of a full storm.

molten-core-gauntlets.name: Molten Core Gauntlets
molten-core-gauntlets.description: Gauntlets forged around a living ember. The heat never fades and neither does the grip.

leather-gloves.name: Leather Gloves
leather-gloves.description: Basic work gloves. Keep the blisters at bay.

wool-mittens.name: Wool Mittens
wool-mittens.description: Warm mittens knit by temple acolytes. Surprisingly comforting.

iron-knuckles.name: Iron Knuckles
iron-knuckles.description: Crude but effective. Good for punching and blocking.

linen-wraps.name: Linen Wraps
linen-wraps.description: Thin wraps that keep fingers nimble for spellcasting.

hide-bracers.name: Hide Bracers
hide-bracers.description: Simple hide bracers worn by hunters and woodsmen.

gauntlets-of-grip.name: Gauntlets of Grip
gauntlets-of-grip.description: Steel gauntlets with etched grip-lines. What you grab stays grabbed.

spellweave-gloves.name: Spellweave Gloves
spellweave-gloves.description: Silk gloves threaded with mana-conductive fibers.

cutpurse-mitts.name: Cutpurse Mitts
cutpurse-mitts.description: Soft leather mitts with padded fingertips. Silence guaranteed.

prayer-wraps.name: Prayer Wraps
prayer-wraps.description: Linen wraps anointed with sacred oils. They smell of frankincense.

bowstring-gloves.name: Bowstring Gloves
bowstring-gloves.description: Reinforced fingertips for rapid nocking and clean releases.

frostweave-grips.name: Frostweave Grips
frostweave-grips.description: Gloves woven with frost crystal threads. Never lose grip, never feel cold.

forgemaster-grips.name: Forgemaster Grips
forgemaster-grips.description: Heat-proof gloves used by Emberveil smiths. Grip anything.

reality-grips.name: Reality Grips
reality-grips.description: Gloves that anchor the wearer to reality. Grip anything, even void energy.
